title: cirsium englerianum
intro: Cirsium englerianum, also known as the Engler's thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Cirsium englerianum is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can be used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
